---
name: object-props
object_config:
  model_name: test-model
  schema:
    type: object
    properties:
      answer:
        type: string
    required: ["answer"]
test_settings:
  props:
    userMessage: "From test props"
  dataset: object.dataset.jsonl
  evals: [exact_match]
input_schema:
  type: object
  properties:
    userMessage:
      type: string
  required:
    - userMessage
---

<System>
You are a helpful math tutor.
</System>

<User>
{props.userMessage}
</User>
